name: codex-powershell-guardrails
description: PowerShell and Windows guardrails for Codex agents: safer commands, encoding hygiene, remote Windows SSH patterns, and release artifact checks.

interface.shortDescription: Avoid common Codex mistakes on Windows and PowerShell.
interface.longDescription: Practical guardrails for Codex agents working in Windows/PowerShell environments, including here-string patterns, UTF-8/BOM hygiene, safe file operations, SSH quoting, scheduled-task exit codes, and release artifact checks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use PowerShell Guardrails to review or write Windows-safe Codex commands.
